{{Quote|Make sure everyone knows that a Mandalorian called Briika Jeban died to save a citizen of the New Republic.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to [[Kubariet]]|<ref name="Boba Fett: A Practical Man">''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]''</ref>}}
'''Briika Jeban''' was a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]. She was a widow with one daughter, [[Dinua Jeban]]. Dinua was thirteen years of age, and by Mandalorian tradition was considered a full adult.

She was part of the group of Mandalorians assembled by [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] when he met with [[Nom Anor]] to discuss the role of the Mandalorians in the upcoming [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invasion. When the Mandalorians covertly attempted to feed intelligence to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] on [[New Holgha]] by sending a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] named [[Kubariet]] back to Republic space, Briika was fatally injured. In order to keep their deception, the Mandalorians killed two Yuuzhan Vong warriors. Briika tackled one to the ground but was impaled by one of the spikes on the warrior's [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|vonduun crab armor]]. Despite the efforts of [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]{{'s}} [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] to save her, Briika died saving the life of a Jedi. Her daughter Dinua was adopted by fellow Mandalorians [[Goran Beviin]] and [[Medrit Vasur]].

Her name was derived from the [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] adjective "''briikase''," or "happy."
